description_long: This object consists of three round muffins, each with a golden-brown baked surface and a prominent white icing drizzled in an irregular, web-like pattern across the tops and sides. The muffins are nestled in dark brown, ridged paper wrappers with a subtle yellow band near the base, giving them a classic bakery appearance. The icing appears glossy and slightly translucent, contrasting with the matte, textured muffin surface beneath. The muffins are grouped closely together, suggesting they are part of a set or display. No additional toppings or decorative elements are visible beyond the icing. The muffins are shown against a plain white background, emphasizing their form and details.
description: Three golden-brown muffins with glossy white drizzled icing, each in a dark brown ridged wrapper with a yellow band, grouped together.
description_view_0: Three muffins are visible, with the central muffin slightly forward and the icing pattern most prominent on the tops.
description_view_1: The muffins are viewed from a slight angle, showing more of the side surfaces and the drizzled icing extending down the sides.
description_view_2: The muffins are arranged in a triangular formation, with the front muffin centered and the icing pattern clearly visible.
description_view_3: The muffins are seen from the opposite side, highlighting the rear muffin and the consistent icing drizzle on all surfaces.
attribute_frosting_style: drizzled icing in irregular, web-like patterns
attribute_wrapper_pattern: dark brown with a yellow horizontal band near the base, ridged texture
